Home › Visa Checker › Indian Passport + UAE Residence
Passport combo guide

Indian passport + UAE residence: extra visa-free countries

If you hold an Indian passport and a valid UAE residence permit, you unlock visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to destinations that the Indian passport alone cannot reach. Here's the complete, sourced list — verified April 2026.

5bonus destinations
27visa-free on Indian passport
31visa-on-arrival

Countries unlocked by your UAE residence permit

These destinations grant easier entry specifically because you are a UAE resident. Day-limits, restrictions, and screening notes are drawn from official government sources.

  • Georgia✓
    Visa-free
    90 days
    Permit must be valid 1+ year on arrival. 17 nationalities (Pakistan, Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Nigeria, etc.) face stricter screening — verify at geoconsul.gov.ge
    Official source ↗
  • Armenia✓
    Visa-free
    180 days
    All GCC residence permit holders get 180 days visa-free
    Official source ↗
  • Azerbaijan✓
    Visa on arrival
    30 days
    Visa on arrival at Baku airport for UAE residence permit holders. Permit must have 6+ months validity. e-Visa also available.
    Official source ↗
  • Oman✓
    e-Visa
    30 days
    GCC residents get eVisa (~5 OMR / $13). Apply at evisa.rop.gov.om as 'GCC Resident'. UAE residence must have 3+ months validity.
    Official source ↗
  • Bahrain✓
    Visa on arrival
    14 days
    GCC residence holders can get VoA (14 days). Laborer occupations excluded. Alternatively apply for eVisa at evisa.gov.bh.
    Official source ↗

How to use your UAE residence for travel

  1. Carry both documents: Your Indian passport and your valid UAE Emirates ID + residence visa stamp. Some immigration officers ask for both.
  2. Check validity rules: Most countries require your UAE residence to be valid 6+ months beyond entry; some (Georgia) require 12+ months.
  3. Verify before booking: Rules change frequently. Use the "Official source" link next to each country to check embassy-level details.
  4. Book flexible tickets on your first trip under this combo — edge cases happen at immigration, especially for newer residence permit types.

What your Indian passport already gets you

Even without the UAE permit, an Indian passport currently provides visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to 58 countries. Here are the strongest entries:

  • Angola
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Barbados
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Bhutan
    Visa-free · 14 days
  • Dominica
    Visa-free · 180 days
  • El Salvador
    Visa-free · 180 days
  • Fiji
    Visa-free · 120 days
  • Gambia
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Grenada
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Haiti
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Iran
    Visa-free · 15 days
  • Jamaica
    Visa-free
  • Kazakhstan
    Visa-free · 14 days
  • Kiribati
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Macao
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Malaysia
    Visa-free
  • Mauritius
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Micronesia
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Nepal
    Visa-free
  • Palestine
    Visa-free
  • Rwanda
    Visa-free · 30 days
  • Saint Kitts and Nevis
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Saint Vincent and the Grenadines
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Senegal
    Visa-free · 90 days
  • Seychelles
    Visa-free · 90 days

See the full Indian passport visa-free list →

Frequently asked questions

Which countries can Indians visit visa-free with a UAE residence visa?
A UAE residence permit unlocks visa-free or visa-on-arrival access to countries like Georgia, Armenia, Azerbaijan, and more — on top of what Indian passport holders can already visit. We list all of them below with official sources and day-limits.
Do I need to carry my UAE Emirates ID when travelling?
Yes. Most countries that grant entry to UAE residents will ask to see your valid Emirates ID and/or residence visa stamp in your passport at immigration. Carry both, plus proof of return ticket and accommodation.
Does a UAE visit visa count, or only a residence permit?
Only a valid UAE residence permit (issued for work, investor, family, student, or golden-visa categories) counts for these bonus travel privileges. A short-stay UAE tourist visa does not unlock the same benefits.
My UAE residence visa expires soon — will it still work for travel?
Most countries require your UAE residence permit to be valid for at least 6 months beyond your planned entry date, and some (like Georgia) require 1+ year of remaining validity. Always verify with the destination embassy before booking.
Does this also apply to other GCC residence permits (Saudi, Qatar, Kuwait)?
Some exemptions — notably Armenia — apply to all GCC residence permit holders, not just UAE. But most countries on this list are specific to UAE residents. Always check the official source linked next to each country.
How accurate is this list?
We compile these exemptions from official government sources (embassies, ministries of foreign affairs). Last verified: April 2026. Visa rules change without notice — always verify with the destination embassy before booking travel.
